landing.hero_badge: 30-day free trial — no credit card needed
landing.hero_description: Vazix helps small shops sell online and receive orders directly on WhatsApp. No technical skills needed.
landing.features_title: Everything you need to sell online
landing.feature_shop_desc: A beautiful public page for your shop with products, images, and pricing.
landing.feature_whatsapp_desc: Customers send orders directly to your WhatsApp. No API needed.
landing.feature_pickup_desc: Support both pickup and delivery with time slots and delivery fees.
landing.feature_products_desc: Add, edit, and organize your products with categories and images.
landing.feature_qr_desc: Share your shop link or QR code on social media and physical materials.
landing.feature_bilingual_desc: Full bilingual support for both your shop and the customer experience.
landing.how_step1_desc: Fill in your name, email, WhatsApp number and a password.
landing.how_step2_desc: The admin reviews your request and activates your account, usually within 24 hours.
landing.how_step3_desc: Add your shop details, logo, and products. Your 30-day free trial starts automatically.
landing.how_step4_desc: Share your shop link or QR code. Customers order and it goes straight to your WhatsApp.
landing.cta_banner_desc: Register now and get your shop online in minutes. 30-day free trial included.
landing.pricing_trial_desc: No credit card required. Get started immediately.
landing.faq_1_q: Do customers need to create an account?
landing.faq_1_a: No. Customers can browse and order without any account.
landing.faq_2_q: Do I need the WhatsApp Business API?
landing.faq_2_a: No. Orders are sent via a regular WhatsApp link. No API needed.
landing.faq_3_a: V1 uses WhatsApp ordering only. Payment is handled directly with the customer.
landing.faq_4_a: Yes. Vazix fully supports Arabic with RTL layout.
landing.footer_tagline: Create your shop. Get orders on WhatsApp.

auth.forgot_password_desc: Enter your email and we will notify the admin to send you a reset link.
auth.reset_request_sent_desc: The admin has been notified. You will receive a reset link on your WhatsApp shortly.
auth.register_subtitle: Fill in your details. The admin will review and approve your account.
auth.register_success_desc: Your request is pending admin approval. You will be notified via WhatsApp once approved.
auth.error_invalid_email: Please enter a valid email address.
auth.error_pending: Your account is pending admin approval.
auth.error_suspended: Your account has been suspended. Contact support.
auth.error_password_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.error_email_taken: This email is already registered. Try logging in.
auth.error_save: Failed to save. Please try again.

onboarding.title: Complete your profile
onboarding.subtitle: Tell us a bit about yourself to get started.
onboarding.error_save: Failed to save profile. Please try again.

dashboard.pending_desc: Your account is under review. You'll be notified on WhatsApp once approved. After approval you can create your shop and start receiving orders.
dashboard.subscription_expired_notice: Your subscription has expired. Renew to keep receiving orders.
dashboard.renew_contact: Contact us on WhatsApp to renew.

shop_form.slug_hint: Your shop will be at: vazix.app/shop/{slug}
shop_form.error_required: Shop name, slug, and WhatsApp number are required.
shop_form.error_slug_taken: This slug is already taken. Please choose another.
shop_form.error_save: Failed to save shop. Please try again.

product_form.confirm_delete: Are you sure you want to delete this product?
product_form.error_required: Product name and price are required.
product_form.error_save: Failed to save product. Please try again.

cart.title: Your order
cart.min_order_notice: Minimum order for delivery is {amount} SAR.
cart.order_error: Failed to place order. Please try again.
cart.no_fulfillment: This shop is not accepting orders right now.
cart.error_required: Please fill in all required fields.
cart.error_phone: Please enter a valid phone number.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.pending_desc: Review and approve new shop owner accounts.
admin.reset_requests_desc: Generate a reset link and send it to the user via WhatsApp.
admin.reset_link_instructions: Copy this link and send it to the user on WhatsApp. It expires in 1 hour.
admin.error_revoke_self: You cannot revoke your own admin access.

subscription.renew_desc: Contact us on WhatsApp to renew. Plans start at 99 SAR/month.

errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized to view this page.
errors.server_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
